lines.english: Why did the plane turn back?
lines.raw: Why did the plane turn back? | 飞机为什么返航了？

lines.english: I used to travel by air a great deal when I was a boy.
lines.chinese: 我小时候经常乘飞机旅行。
lines.raw: I used to travel by air a great deal when I was a boy. | 我小时候经常乘飞机旅行。

lines.english: My parents used to live in South America and I used to fly there from Europe in the holidays.
lines.chinese: 我父母过去住在南美洲，我放假时常从欧洲飞到那里。
lines.raw: My parents used to live in South America and I used to fly there from Europe in the holidays. | 我父母过去住在南美洲，我放假时常从欧洲飞到那里。

lines.english: A flight attendant would take charge of me and I never had an unpleasant experience.
lines.chinese: 乘务员会照顾我，我从未有过不愉快的经历。
lines.raw: A flight attendant would take charge of me and I never had an unpleasant experience. | 乘务员会照顾我，我从未有过不愉快的经历。

lines.english: I am used to travelling by air and only on one occasion have I ever felt frightened.
lines.chinese: 我习惯了乘飞机旅行，只有一次感到害怕。
lines.raw: I am used to travelling by air and only on one occasion have I ever felt frightened. | 我习惯了乘飞机旅行，只有一次感到害怕。

lines.english: After taking off, we were flying low over the city and slowly gaining height,
lines.chinese: 起飞后，我们低空飞过城市，慢慢爬升，
lines.raw: After taking off, we were flying low over the city and slowly gaining height, | 起飞后，我们低空飞过城市，慢慢爬升，

lines.english: when the plane suddenly turned round and flew back to the airport.
lines.chinese: 飞机突然掉头飞回了机场。
lines.raw: when the plane suddenly turned round and flew back to the airport. | 飞机突然掉头飞回了机场。

lines.english: While we were waiting to land, a flight attendant told us to keep calm
lines.chinese: 当我们等待降落时，一位乘务员告诉我们要保持冷静，
lines.raw: While we were waiting to land, a flight attendant told us to keep calm | 当我们等待降落时，一位乘务员告诉我们要保持冷静，

lines.english: and to get off the plane quietly as soon as it had touched down.
lines.chinese: 飞机一着陆就安静地下飞机。
lines.raw: and to get off the plane quietly as soon as it had touched down. | 飞机一着陆就安静地下飞机。

lines.english: Everybody on board was worried and we were curious to find out what had happened.
lines.chinese: 飞机上的每个人都很担心，我们都很好奇发生了什么事。
lines.raw: Everybody on board was worried and we were curious to find out what had happened. | 飞机上的每个人都很担心，我们都很好奇发生了什么事。

lines.english: Later we learnt that there was a very important person on board.
lines.chinese: 后来我们得知飞机上有一位非常重要的人物。
lines.raw: Later we learnt that there was a very important person on board. | 后来我们得知飞机上有一位非常重要的人物。

lines.english: The police had been told that a bomb had been planted on the plane.
lines.chinese: 警方接到报告说飞机上被安放了炸弹。
lines.raw: The police had been told that a bomb had been planted on the plane. | 警方接到报告说飞机上被安放了炸弹。

lines.english: After we had landed, the plane was searched thoroughly.
lines.chinese: 飞机降落后，被彻底搜查了一番。
lines.raw: After we had landed, the plane was searched thoroughly. | 飞机降落后，被彻底搜查了一番。

lines.english: Fortunately, nothing was found and five hours later we were able to take off again.
lines.chinese: 幸运的是，什么也没发现，五小时后我们得以再次起飞。
lines.raw: Fortunately, nothing was found and five hours later we were able to take off again. | 幸运的是，什么也没发现，五小时后我们得以再次起飞。
